name: Treasure in the Mountains!
goal-condition: 2000 Pts Before Time Over or 2000 Pts Plus Ltd Paw Pass
fail-condition: Reward Zero or Gather Less than 2000pts, Time Over
special-conditions: Quest for two hunters or less. No personal items.
quest-details: Gather the treasure that lies sleeping in the field to earn points. I will calculate your total and reward you based on how much you can collect. Leave no treasure undiscovered!
